title: Colymbada × ceballosii
taxonomy: Colymbada × ceballosii is a hybrid species within the plant family Asteraceae. It is a sterile hybrid between Colymbada azoides and Colymbada pulchella. This plant is native to the Iberian Peninsula, specifically in the mountainous regions of northern Spain. Colymbada × ceballosii is a rare and endangered species due to its limited geographic range and habitat. Its classification as a hybrid species highlights the complexities of plant taxonomy and the need for continued research in this field.
